SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo

Interface MeteoAlertI

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
MeteoAlert
public interface MeteoAlertI extends Serializable
The interface MeteoAlertI defines the signatures of methods to be implemented by meteo alerts emitted by meteo stations.

Description

Invariants 

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-23

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    MeteoAlertI.AlertType
    The class AlterType defines the standard meteo alerts.
    static interface 
    MeteoAlertI.AlertTypeI
    The interface AlertTypeI defines the type of meteo alerts.
    static enum 
    MeteoAlertI.Level
    The enumeration Level defines the standard levels used in meteo alerts.
    static interface 
    MeteoAlertI.LevelI
    The interface LevelI defines the type for levels in meteo alerts.

    Method
    Description
    MeteoAlertI.AlertTypeI
    getAlertType()
    return the alert type of this meteo alert.
    Duration
    getDuration()
    return the duration of the alert.
    MeteoAlertI.LevelI
    getLevel()
    return the level of the alert.
    RegionI[]
    getRegions()
    return the regions that are concerned by the alert.

    return the start time of the alert.

  • Method Details

    • getAlertType

      MeteoAlertI.AlertTypeI getAlertType()
      return the alert type of this meteo alert.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the alert type of this meteo alert.

    • getLevel

      MeteoAlertI.LevelI getLevel()
      return the level of the alert.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the level of the alert.

    • getRegions

      RegionI[] getRegions()
      return the regions that are concerned by the alert.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null && return.length > 1
      Returns:
      the regions that are concerned by the alert.

    • getStartTime

      return the start time of the alert.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the start time of the alert.

      Duration getDuration()
      return the duration of the alert.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the duration of the alert.
